summary: Iteration 5 bug fix testing complete: Both reported bugs verified as FIXED. 1) Empty chat screen after login - FIXED: returning user now sees welcome message immediately. 2) Auto-reload issue - FIXED: reload prevention script active and no unexpected reloads during 30s monitoring. All user flows tested successfully.

returning_user.note: User with onboarding_complete=true, goes directly to chat

new_user_created.note: Created during testing - saw beta modal + onboarding flow

bug_1_empty_chat_after_login.test_result: Returning user (returning@test.com) now goes directly to chat with welcome message 'Hey ReturningUser! 👋'. NO empty screen.
bug_1_empty_chat_after_login.code_fix_location: /app/frontend/src/App.jsx handleAuth() line 1270-1282 - now loads chat sessions and welcome messages for returning users

bug_2_auto_reload.test_result: Monitored for 30 seconds on chat screen - no auto-reload detected. Reload prevention script active in index.html
code_fix_locations: /app/frontend/index.html - WebSocket interception and location.reload() override script

steps_tested: Splash → Auth → SignUp → Beta Modal (2000 coins) → Onboarding → Name → Language → Chat with welcome message
Splash → Auth → Login → Direct to Chat with welcome message (bypasses onboarding)

chat_functionality.details: User message sent, AI response received in Hinglish

ui_alignment.details: All screens properly centered on desktop (1920x1080). Sidebar + chat layout correct.

reload_prevention.details: Script loaded in index.html head, intercepts WebSocket errors and blocks automatic location.reload() calls

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/08_chat_test.png - Chat with user message and AI response
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both reported bugs are verified fixed. Returning users with onboarding_complete=true go directly to chat with welcome message. Auto-reload prevention script is active in index.html head section, intercepting Vite WebSocket errors and location.reload() calls. Test user returning@test.com available for quick regression testing.
